  "text": "The Kubernetes RBAC authorization implementation spans several key areas:\n\n1. **RBACAuthorizer** (`plugin/pkg/auth/authorizer/rbac/rbac.go`): The main RBAC authorizer with the `Authorize(ctx, attributes)` method and `RulesFor` method. It uses a `RequestToRuleMapper` (the `authorizationRuleResolver`) to resolve rules and check if they match the request attributes.\n\n2. **SubjectAccessEvaluator** (`plugin/pkg/auth/authorizer/rbac/subject_locator.go`): Implements `SubjectLocator` interface and finds all subjects (users, groups, service accounts) that have permissions for a given request. Uses `NewSubjectAccessEvaluator` constructor.\n\n3. **DefaultRuleResolver** (`pkg/registry/rbac/validation/rule.go`): Resolves PolicyRules for a user by looking up RoleBindings/ClusterRoleBindings and then fetching the referenced Roles/ClusterRoles. `NewDefaultRuleResolver` constructs it with role/binding getters. The `RulesFor` method returns all applicable rules for a user in a namespace.\n\n4. **SubjectAccessReview REST handlers**:\n   - `pkg/registry/authorization/subjectaccessreview/rest.go`: Cluster-scoped SAR handler\n   - `pkg/registry/authorization/localsubjectaccessreview/rest.go`: Namespace-scoped SAR handler\n   - `pkg/registry/authorization/selfsubjectaccessreview/rest.go`: Self SAR handler\n\n5. **Bootstrap RBAC policy definitions** (`plugin/pkg/auth/authorizer/rbac/bootstrappolicy/`):\n   - `policy.go`: Main bootstrap policies defining default ClusterRoles and ClusterRoleBindings\n   - `controller_policy.go`: Bootstrap policies for controllers\n   - `namespace_policy.go`: Namespace-specific bootstrap policies\n\n6. **Policy-based storage with escalation prevention**:\n   - `pkg/registry/rbac/role/policybased/storage.go`: Role storage that prevents privilege escalation\n   - `pkg/registry/rbac/clusterrole/policybased/storage.go`: ClusterRole storage with escalation prevention\n   - `pkg/registry/rbac/rolebinding/policybased/storage.go`: RoleBinding storage\n   - `pkg/registry/rbac/clusterrolebinding/policybased/storage.go`: ClusterRoleBinding storage with escalation prevention\n   - `pkg/registry/rbac/escalation_check.go`: Common escalation checking logic\n   - `pkg/registry/rbac/rest/storage_rbac.go`: RBAC REST storage setup wiring everything together\n   - `pkg/registry/rbac/validation/policy_compact.go`: Policy compaction utilities\n   - `pkg/registry/rbac/validation/internal_version_adapter.go`: Internal version adapters for validation"
}

It uses a `RequestToRuleMapper` (the `authorizationRuleResolver`) to resolve rules and check if they match the request attributes.\n\n2. **SubjectAccessEvaluator** (`plugin/pkg/auth/authorizer/rbac/subject_locator.go`): Implements `SubjectLocator` interface and finds all subjects (users, groups, service accounts) that have permissions for a given request. Uses `NewSubjectAccessEvaluator` constructor.\n\n3. **DefaultRuleResolver** (`pkg/registry/rbac/validation/rule.go`): Resolves PolicyRules for a user by looking up RoleBindings/ClusterRoleBindings and then fetching the referenced Roles/ClusterRoles. `NewDefaultRuleResolver` constructs it with role/binding getters.
